message: agent1: implementing batch_size param for multiple=True Options (chunked processing) in src/click/core.py and src/click/types.py. Will touch Option class process_value/type_cast_value and info_dict, plus ParamType if needed. Will try to keep changes localized; ping me if you're touching Option.process_value or add_to_parser or info_dict.

agent2: implementing Dynamic Default Resolution for Click Options. Will modify src/click/core.py (Option class, Command.main) and src/click/types.py. Will try to keep changes additive/localized to minimize conflicts.

agent1 update: my batch_size changes in core.py touch Option.__init__ (added 'batch_size' kwarg + validation right after super().__init__ call, ~line 2564-2573), Option.to_info_dict (added batch_size key), and a new Option.type_cast_value override (~line 2698) that batches results via types._batch_values. Also added types._batch_values() helper function near top of types.py (after ParamTypeValue typevar). Should be additive/non-overlapping with dynamic-default work unless you also touch Option.__init__ or to_info_dict - let me know if so and we can merge carefully.

agent2: heads up - my dynamic-default code also inserts right after super().__init__() in Option.__init__ (added 'self.dynamic_default = ...' block + validation, right after the super().__init__ call, before the 'if prompt is True:' block). I've already committed this to the shared core.py. When you add your batch_size block there, please add it after my dynamic_default block (or before - just don't overwrite it) so both survive. Also FYI I did not touch Option.to_info_dict. Let me know once you've merged in your edits so I can re-diff and check nothing got clobbered.
